item.title: Cleveland Rain Alert: Secure Your Foundation!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Upcoming heavy rains pose a serious threat to Cleveland home foundations. Discover crucial steps to prevent water damage and costly repairs for your property. Watch now to protect your home.
item.content:encoded:
Upcoming heavy rains pose a serious threat to Cleveland home foundations. Discover crucial steps to prevent water damage and costly repairs for your property. Watch now to protect your home.

Watch on Lakefront Leak & Drain

item.title: Cleveland Homeowners: Your Gutters, Your Basement's Best Defense!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Protecting your Cleveland basement starts at the roofline. Discover how clean, functional gutters are your home's most important safeguard against water damage and foundation issues. Watch our video to safeguard your basement today!
item.content:encoded:
Protecting your Cleveland basement starts at the roofline. Discover how clean, functional gutters are your home's most important safeguard against water damage and foundation issues. Watch our video to safeguard your basement today!

item.title: Cleveland Spring Drain Check: Essential Home Prep
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Don't let spring showers turn into a plumbing nightmare. Learn how to quickly clear your outdoor drains and prevent costly water damage. Learn how to protect your home now!
item.content:encoded:
Don't let spring showers turn into a plumbing nightmare. Learn how to quickly clear your outdoor drains and prevent costly water damage. Learn how to protect your home now!

item.title: Cleveland Rains: Is Your Basement Flood-Ready?
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland's weather can bring heavy rains, posing a significant threat to your basement. Discover how to assess your home's flood risk and implement effective preventive measures. Learn how to protect your Cleveland home now.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Spring: Stop Costly Sewer Root Invasion in Your Home!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: As Cleveland springs to life, growing tree roots can aggressively seek water, often invading your home's sewer lines. This video offers crucial advice to help homeowners prevent expensive and messy plumbing disasters. Learn how to protect your property now!
item.content:encoded:
As Cleveland springs to life, growing tree roots can aggressively seek water, often invading your home's sewer lines. This video offers crucial advice to help homeowners prevent expensive and messy plumbing disasters. Learn how to protect your property now!

item.title: Cleveland April Freeze: Protect Your Pipes
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: The recent cold snap puts your home's plumbing at risk. Learn critical steps to prevent costly pipe bursts and water damage. Don't wait until it's too late; watch now.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Alert: Freezing Temps Bring Pipe Rupture Risk Tonight!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Temperatures are dropping to 24F overnight, significantly increasing the risk of frozen and burst pipes. Learn essential steps to protect your home and plumbing from damage. Watch now for critical pipe protection tips.
item.content:encoded:
Temperatures are dropping to 24F overnight, significantly increasing the risk of frozen and burst pipes. Learn essential steps to protect your home and plumbing from damage. Watch now for critical pipe protection tips.

item.title: Cleveland Thaw Alert: Safeguard Your Pipes Now!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: As Cleveland warms, frozen pipes can rupture, causing costly damage. Watch this video for crucial steps to protect your home and avoid disaster. Watch now for vital prevention tips.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Thaw-Rain Alert: Check Your Sump Pump!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland is facing a significant thaw and rain event this week. This weather combination puts your home at risk for basement flooding if your sump pump isn't prepared. Watch our video for crucial sump pump readiness steps.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Thaw: Protect Your Home from Pipe Leaks!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: As Cleveland warms up, thawing pipes can reveal hidden issues. Discover crucial spots to check for leaks and protect your home from water damage. Watch now for essential pipe seam inspection tips.

item.title: Cleveland: Urgent Garage Pipe Freeze Alert Tonight!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland homeowners, extreme cold is headed our way tonight. Your garage pipes are at high risk of freezing and bursting. Watch now for essential freezing prevention tips!
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Thaw Alert: Spot Leak Clues Now!

item.description: As Cleveland's snow melts, your home faces increased risk of water leaks. This video shares critical visual clues to help you find them fast. Watch now to protect your home.

item.title: Cleveland Freeze Alert: Detach Hoses!

item.description: Freezing temperatures are headed for Cleveland. Learn why detaching your outdoor hoses is crucial to prevent burst pipes. Watch now for essential winter prep tips.

item.title: Cleveland Freeze Alert: Protect Your Pipes Now!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Freezing temperatures can cause water in outdoor hoses to burst pipes inside your home. Disconnect all exterior hoses immediately to avoid costly water damage. Watch now for crucial home protection tips.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Cleveland Basement Flood? Not Your Sump's Fault!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Experiencing a basement flood in Cleveland and blaming your sump pump? The real culprit might be something entirely different and preventable. Watch our video to uncover the surprising truth!

item.title: Cleveland Drains Slow? Discover the Underground Culprit!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland homeowners, are your drains slowing down? This common issue often signals underground root growth in your pipes. Watch to learn how to identify and resolve the problem.
